case_title: TRACY HEARNE VS. JASMINE DENEE MURRY-THOMAS

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-28-2018 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $330.00 FILED BY HEARNE, TRACY AS TO DEFENDANT MURRY-THOMAS, JASMINE DENEE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-26-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-28-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-28-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF TRACY HEARNE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JASMINE DENEE MURRY-THOMAS IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-02-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF HEARNE, TRACY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HEARNE, TRACY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MURRY-THOMAS, JASMINE DENEE DEFENDANT PAID PLAINTIFF THE REMAINING BALANCE ON THEIR PAYMENT AGREEMENT AT THE TIME OF TRIAL. ACCORDINGLY THE CASE IS MOOT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
